zh.St Peter Churchyard, Thurston, Mid Suffo: 英國英格蘭肯特斯文費爾德聖 彼得 亞德
zh.Thurston, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭素福爾可瑟斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Drury於1315年出生在英國素福爾可瑟斯頓時，他的父親Sir Henry Drury Esq75歲，母親Hawise Greene40歲。他於1343年與Amabilia Newton在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1379年在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特斯文費爾德聖 彼得 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Drury于1315年出生在英国素福爾可瑟斯頓时，他的父亲Sir Henry Drury Esq75岁，母亲Hawise Greene40岁。他于1343年与Amabilia Newton在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1379年在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特斯文費爾德聖 彼得 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Drury was born in 1315, in Thurston, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Henry Drury Esq, was 75 and his mother, Hawise Greene, was 40. He married Amabilia Newton in 1343, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1379, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in St Peter Churchyard, Swingfield, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Peter Churchyard, Thurston, Mid Suffo: St Peter Churchyard, Swingfield, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Drury est né en 1315, à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Drury Esq, avait 75 ans et sa mère, Hawise Greene, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Amabilia Newton en 1343, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1379, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à St Peter Churchyard, Swingfield, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Peter Churchyard, Thurston, Mid Suffo: St Peter Churchyard, Swingfield, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Drury 1315 in Thurston, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Drury Esq 75 und seine Mutter Hawise Greene 40. Er hat 1343 in Suffolk, England Amabilia Newton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1379 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Peter Churchyard, Swingfield, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Drury è nato il nel 1315 nel Thurston, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Drury Esq, aveva 75 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Greene, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Amabilia Newton nel 1343, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1379, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a St Peter Churchyard, Swingfield, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.St Peter Churchyard, Thurston, Mid Suffo: イギリスイギリスケントスウィングフィールドスト ペター チャーチヤルド
ja.Thurston, Suffolk, England, United Kingd: イギリスイギリススフォルクスウルストン
ja.Thurston, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクスウルストン
ja.lifeSummary: John Druryが1315年にイギリススフォルクスウルストンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Drury Esqは75歳，母Hawise Greeneは40歳であった。1343年にイギリススフォルクでAmabilia Newtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1379年に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントスウィングフィールドスト ペター チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter Churchyard, Thurston, Mid Suffo: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스윙필드 스트 피터 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: John Drury(이)가 1315년 영국 수폴크 스르스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Drury Esq(은)는 75세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Greene(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1343년 영국 수폴크에서 Amabilia Newton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1379년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스윙필드 스트 피터 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Drury nasceu em 1315, em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Drury Esq, tinha 75 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Greene, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabilia Newton em 1343, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1379, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em St Peter Churchyard, Swingfield, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Peter Churchyard, Thurston, Mid Suffo: ст питир чурчярд, свингфиелд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Drury родился в 1315 г. в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Drury Esq было 75 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Greene, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilia Newton в 1343 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1379 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ст питир чурчярд, свингфиелд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Drury nació en 1315, en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Drury Esq, tenía 75 años y su mamá, Hawise Greene, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Amabilia Newton en 1343, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1379, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en St Peter Churchyard, Swingfield, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
